# DBUI — Complete AI Reference
# URL: https://dbuidesign.vercel.app/llms-full.txt
# For setup only, see: https://dbuidesign.vercel.app/llms.txt
#
# This file contains everything an LLM needs to install, configure,
# and build with DBUI. One fetch gives you the full picture.

---

# PART 1: SETUP

## What is DBUI?

DBUI is the Databricks component library — 46 components, 451 icons, 162 design tokens, dark mode, and page shells. Built on shadcn/ui + Base UI + Tailwind CSS v4, reskinned with DuBois design tokens.

---

## Install

Run ALL steps automatically. Check before each step — skip if already done.

### Step 0: Ensure a React project exists

```bash
# Skip this step entirely if package.json already exists
if [ ! -f "package.json" ]; then
  npx create-next-app@latest . --typescript --tailwind --app --no-src-dir --no-eslint --no-import-alias
fi
```

### Step 1: Clone the repo and copy packages into the project

```bash
# Clone source repo if not already present
if [ ! -d "$HOME/dbui" ]; then
  git clone https://github.com/muditmittal/dbui.git ~/dbui
fi

# Copy packages (safe to re-run — overwrites with latest)
cp -r ~/dbui/packages/dbui ./dbui
cp -r ~/dbui/packages/dbui-shells ./dbui-shells
```

### Step 2: Copy the AI rules file

```bash
cp ./dbui/CLAUDE.md ./CLAUDE.md
```

Read CLAUDE.md now — it contains component rules, import patterns, and reference file locations.

### Step 3: Configure the project (skip parts already done)

**Path aliases** — add to `tsconfig.json` (skip if `dbui/*` path already exists):
```json
{
  "compilerOptions": {
    "paths": {
      "dbui/*": ["./dbui/src/*"],
      "dbui-shells/*": ["./dbui-shells/src/*"]
    }
  }
}
```
If using webpack/vite, also add equivalent resolve aliases in the bundler config.

**CSS tokens** — add to the root CSS file (skip if already imported):
```css
@import "tailwindcss";
@import "./dbui/src/tokens/globals.css";
```

**Peer dependencies** — install any that are missing:
```bash
npm install @base-ui/react class-variance-authority clsx
```

### Step 4: Create an initial page with the Base Shell and start the dev server

If no page renders the Base Shell yet, create one. For Next.js (app/page.tsx):

```tsx
import { Base } from "dbui-shells"

export default function Home() {
  return (
    <Base defaultActive="catalog">
      <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "center", height: "100%" }}>
        <p style={{ fontSize: 13, color: "#6F6F6F" }}>
          DBUI is installed. Start building here.
        </p>
      </div>
    </Base>
  )
}
```

Then start the dev server:
```bash
npm run dev
```

The designer should see the full Databricks shell — Platform Header, sidebar nav, content surface — running locally. From here, ask the LLM to build any Databricks page using DBUI components.

---

## Update an existing install

```bash
cd ~/dbui && git pull
cp -r ~/dbui/packages/dbui ./dbui
cp -r ~/dbui/packages/dbui-shells ./dbui-shells
cp ./dbui/CLAUDE.md ./CLAUDE.md
```

---

## Requirements

- Node.js 18+
- React 18+
- Tailwind CSS v4+

## Resources

- Storybook: https://dbuidesign.vercel.app
- GitHub: https://github.com/muditmittal/dbui
- Full AI reference: https://dbuidesign.vercel.app/llms-full.txt
- Issues: https://github.com/muditmittal/dbui/issues

---

# PART 2: AI RULES (from CLAUDE.md)

## Rules

1. **DBUI components only.** Never use raw `<button>`, `<input>`, `<div role="dialog">`. If it exists in DBUI, use it.
2. **DBUI icons only.** Never install lucide, heroicons, or any icon package. All 451 icons are in `dbui/components/icons/`.
3. **Semantic tokens only.** Never hardcode hex colors or pixel values. Use `bg-primary`, `text-foreground`, `rounded-sm`, etc.
4. **Base UI `render` prop.** Not Radix `asChild`. Example: `<DialogTrigger render={<Button />}>Open</DialogTrigger>`
5. **Shell first.** Every page starts with `<Base>`. Never build header/nav/chrome from scratch.
6. **Tree for hierarchies.** Never fake trees with nested divs or NavbarItems. Use `<DataTreeView>` or `<FileTreeView>`.

## Where to look

| When you need to... | Read this file |
|---------------------|----------------|
| Find the right component | `./dbui/llms.txt` → "When to use what" table |
| Compose a page layout | `./dbui/llms.txt` → "COMPOSITION RECIPES" |
| Find an icon by concept | `./dbui/docs/icon-index.md` — canonical 449-icon index |
| Get entity icons for trees | `./dbui/src/components/icons/entity-icons.ts` |
| Check component props | `~/dbui/packages/dbui/llms.txt` → "Key props for stateful components" |
| See token values | `~/dbui/packages/dbui/src/tokens/globals.css` |
| Browse all components | Run `cd ~/dbui && yarn workspace portal storybook` |

## Every page starts with the Base Shell

```tsx
import { Base } from "dbui-shells"

<Base defaultActive="catalog">
  {/* Your page content goes here */}
</Base>
```

The Shell provides:
- **Platform Header** (48px) — sidebar toggle, search, workspace switcher, Genie Code, app switcher, profile menu
- **Platform Nav** (180px sidebar) — collapsible, with all nav items grouped by category
- **Content Surface** — white rounded panel where your page lives
- **Assistant Panel** — Genie Code side panel, toggled from header

## Databricks page anatomy

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ Platform Header (48px, bg-muted)                    │
├────────┬────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│Sidebar │ Content surface (bg-background, rounded-md)│
│180px   │                                            │
│bg-muted│ ┌─ Breadcrumb ──────────────────────────┐  │
│        │ │ Catalog > main > users                │  │
│Navbar  │ ├─ Title row ───────────────────────────┤  │
│  items │ │ Icon + Name          Actions buttons  │  │
│  with  │ ├─ Tabs ────────────────────────────────┤  │
│  icons │ │ Overview | Details | Permissions       │  │
│        │ ├─ Tab content ─────────────────────────┤  │
│        │ │                                       │  │
│        │ │ (table, form, cards, etc.)            │  │
│        │ │                                       │  │
│        │ └───────────────────────────────────────┘  │
├────────┴────────────────────────────────────────────┤
```

For detail pages (Catalog Explorer, table details), add a tree panel and metadata sidebar:
- **Left (260px):** Tree header + search + `<DataTreeView>`
- **Center (flex-1):** Breadcrumb → title → tabs → content
- **Right (280px):** `<KeyValuePair>` sections separated by `<Separator>`

Each column scrolls independently.

## Screenshot → Code

When given a screenshot of Databricks UI to implement:

| You see | Use |
|---------|-----|
| Left sidebar with product icons | `Navbar` + `NavbarItem` (every item MUST have an icon) |
| Expandable tree (catalogs, files) | `DataTreeView` or `FileTreeView` — read entity-icons.ts for correct icons |
| Tabs below a title | `Tabs` + `TabsList` + `TabsTrigger` |
| Data table with headers | `Table` + `TableHeader` + `TableBody` |
| Right sidebar with metadata | `KeyValuePair` + `Separator` sections, 13px semibold headers |
| Breadcrumb path | `Breadcrumb` + `BreadcrumbList` + `BreadcrumbItem` |
| Blue filled button | `Button` (variant="default" — this is the primary style) |
| Bordered button | `Button variant="outline"` |
| Button with chevron | `Button` + `ButtonChevron` (menu trigger — use outline, never primary) |
| Button with leading icon | `Button` + `ButtonIcon` wrapper |
| Green checkmark badge | `<Badge variant="outline"><CertifiedFill className="text-success" />` |
| Status dot | `Status` (12 statuses: online, running, error, etc.) |
| Modal/dialog | `Dialog` (task) or `AlertDialog` (confirmation — can't dismiss by clicking outside) |
| Slide-out panel | `Drawer` |
| Dropdown with options | `DropdownMenu` — always `align="start"`, destructive items last |
| Select picker | `Select` (≤10 options) or `Combobox` (>10 or needs search) |
| Tag/chip | `Tag` (removable, key:value) or `Badge` (read-only label) |
| Toast notification | `toast.success()` / `toast.error()` from sonner |
| Loading rows | `Skeleton` inside `TableCell` |
| Empty state with icon | `Empty` (title + description + optional action button) |
| Search + filter bar | `InputGroup` + `InputGroupAddon` + `InputGroupButton` |

## Patterns LLMs get wrong

These are the #1 mistakes from our audit. Internalize them.

**Icon-only buttons use `text-muted-foreground` automatically:**
```tsx
// Size icon-md or icon-sm makes the icon muted — don't add the class yourself
<Button size="icon-md" variant="ghost" aria-label="Search"><Search /></Button>
```

**Icons inside label buttons also muted — use ButtonIcon wrapper:**
```tsx
<Button variant="outline">
  <ButtonIcon><Share /></ButtonIcon>   {/* ← muted automatically */}
  Share
  <ButtonChevron />                    {/* ← trailing menu chevron */}
</Button>
```

**Menu item consistency — if one has an icon, ALL must:**
```tsx
<DropdownMenuContent align="start">
  <DropdownMenuItem><DropdownMenuItemIcon><Pencil /></DropdownMenuItemIcon>Edit</DropdownMenuItem>
  <DropdownMenuItem><DropdownMenuItemIcon><Copy /></DropdownMenuItemIcon>Duplicate</DropdownMenuItem>
  <DropdownMenuSeparator />
  <DropdownMenuItem variant="destructive"><DropdownMenuItemIcon><Trash /></DropdownMenuItemIcon>Delete</DropdownMenuItem>
</DropdownMenuContent>
```

**Tree nodes always need entity icons — never guess:**
```tsx
import { dataEntityIcons } from "dbui/components/icons/entity-icons"

const nodes = [
  { id: "cat1", label: "main", icon: dataEntityIcons.catalogWorkspace, children: [
    { id: "schema1", label: "default", icon: dataEntityIcons.schema, children: [
      { id: "tbl1", label: "users", icon: dataEntityIcons.table },
    ]}
  ]}
]
<DataTreeView sections={[{ label: "My organization", nodes }]} />
```

**Form fields — label above, helper below, error replaces helper:**
```tsx
<div className="flex flex-col gap-1.5">
  <Label htmlFor="name">Name</Label>
  <Input id="name" placeholder="Enter name" />
  <span className="text-[12px] text-muted-foreground">Helper text here</span>
</div>
```

## Typography (Databricks uses 13px base, not 14px or 16px)

| Use | Class |
|-----|-------|
| Body text, input values | `text-[13px] leading-[20px]` |
| Labels, emphasis | `text-[13px] leading-[20px] font-semibold` |
| Captions, helper text | `text-[12px] leading-[16px] text-muted-foreground` |
| Page titles | `text-[22px] font-semibold` |
| Section headings | `text-[18px] font-semibold` |

## Before you commit

Scan your output for these violations:
- `from "lucide-react"` → replace with `from "dbui/components/icons/..."`
- `bg-[#` or `text-[#` → replace with semantic token
- `<button` or `<input` (lowercase) → replace with DBUI component
- `asChild` → replace with `render={<Component />}`
- Nested `<div>` faking a tree → replace with `DataTreeView`
- `text-sm` → replace with `text-[13px]` (Databricks base is 13px, not 14px)
- `font-medium` → replace with `font-semibold` (Databricks uses 600, not 500)
- No `<Base>` wrapper → add it, every page needs it

## Import pattern

```tsx
import { Base } from "dbui-shells"
import { Button, ButtonIcon, ButtonChevron } from "dbui/components/ui/button"
import { DataTreeView } from "dbui/components/ui/data-tree"
import { Search } from "dbui/components/icons/Search"
import { dataEntityIcons } from "dbui/components/icons/entity-icons"
```

CSS setup (one-time in root stylesheet):
```css
@import "tailwindcss";
@import "dbui/tokens/globals.css";
```

## Updating DBUI

To get the latest components, tokens, and icons:
```bash
cd ~/dbui && git pull
```
All projects referencing `~/dbui` pick up changes immediately.

---

# PART 3: COMPONENT API & RECIPES

## MANDATORY RULES

1. ALWAYS use DBUI components. NEVER create raw HTML elements (<button>, <input>, <div role="dialog">) when a DBUI component exists.
2. ALWAYS use DBUI icons from `dbui/components/icons/{Name}`. NEVER install third-party icon packages (lucide, heroicons, etc.).
3. ALWAYS use semantic tokens (bg-primary, text-foreground, border-border). NEVER hardcode hex colors.
4. ALWAYS import from `dbui/components/ui/{component}`. NEVER import from @radix-ui, @base-ui, or shadcn directly.
5. If a DBUI component doesn't exist for what you need, compose from existing DBUI primitives. If that's not possible, flag it — don't build a one-off.
6. When populating Tree components with entity icons, ALWAYS read `dbui/components/icons/entity-icons.ts` first. It maps every Databricks entity type (catalog, schema, table, view, volume, notebook, folder, etc.) to its correct icon. NEVER guess icon names.
7. For hierarchical data (catalogs, files, schemas), ALWAYS use the Tree component — NEVER fake it with nested NavbarItems or manual indentation.

## TRIGGER PATTERN (Base UI)

Base UI components use `render` prop to replace the default element:
  <DialogTrigger render={<Button variant="outline" />}>Open</DialogTrigger>
  <DropdownMenuTrigger render={<Button variant="outline" />}>Actions</DropdownMenuTrigger>
  <PopoverTrigger render={<Button />}>Info</PopoverTrigger>
Do NOT use `asChild` — that is a Radix pattern and is ignored by Base UI.

## COMPONENT INDEX

### When to use what

| User intent | Use this | NOT this |
|-------------|----------|----------|
| Trigger an action | `Button` | raw `<button>` |
| Toggle a state on/off | `Toggle` (with icon) or `Switch` (settings) | checkbox for on/off |
| Switch between views | `Tabs` (content panels) or `SegmentControl` (toolbar filters) | radio group |
| Choose one from a list | `Select` (≤10 options) or `Combobox` (>10 or needs search) | native `<select>` |
| Choose multiple | `Combobox` (multi mode) or checkboxes in a `DropdownMenu` | multi-select HTML |
| Multi-value tags | `TypeaheadCombobox` (ComboboxChips) | custom chip input |
| Confirm destructive action | `AlertDialog` | `Dialog` with red button |
| Show focused task | `Dialog` | full page navigation |
| Show secondary content | `Drawer` (slides from right) | Dialog for detail panels |
| Show context actions | `DropdownMenu` (click) or right-click `ContextMenu` | custom popover with buttons |
| Show additional info on hover | `Tooltip` (text only) or `HoverCard` (rich content) | title attribute |
| Show rich interactive content | `Popover` | Tooltip with forms |
| Persistent inline message | `Alert` (info/warning/danger/success) | Toast for persistent messages |
| Transient feedback | `toast()` via sonner | Alert for temporary messages |
| Loading placeholder | `Skeleton` (known shape) or `Spinner` (indeterminate) | custom loading div |
| Navigate product areas | `Navbar` + `NavbarItem` (sidebar) | custom nav links |
| Browse hierarchical data | `DataTreeView` (catalogs) or `FileTreeView` (files) | nested NavbarItems |
| Show hierarchical path | `Breadcrumb` | slash-separated text |
| Paginate data | `Pagination` | custom page buttons |
| Display structured data | `Table` with typed cells | raw HTML table |
| Tag/filter chip | `Tag` (removable) or `Badge` (read-only status) | custom pill div |
| Metadata display | `KeyValuePair` | description list or custom grid |
| Empty state | `Empty` (title + description + action) | custom centered text |

### Component imports

```
dbui/components/ui/button          → Button, ButtonIcon, ButtonChevron
dbui/components/ui/toggle          → Toggle
dbui/components/ui/segment-control → SegmentControl, SegmentControlItem
dbui/components/ui/split-button    → SplitButton, SplitButtonSeparator
dbui/components/ui/input           → Input
dbui/components/ui/textarea        → Textarea
dbui/components/ui/select          → Select, SelectTrigger, SelectValue, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectGroup, SelectLabel
dbui/components/ui/combobox        → Combobox, ComboboxInput, ComboboxContent, ComboboxList, ComboboxItem, ComboboxLabel, ComboboxChips, ComboboxChip, ComboboxClear
dbui/components/ui/dropdown-menu   → DropdownMenu, DropdownMenuTrigger, DropdownMenuContent, DropdownMenuItem, DropdownMenuCheckboxItem, DropdownMenuRadioItem, DropdownMenuRadioGroup, DropdownMenuLabel, DropdownMenuSeparator, DropdownMenuShortcut, DropdownMenuSub, DropdownMenuSubTrigger, DropdownMenuSubContent, DropdownMenuItemIcon, DropdownMenuItemDescription, DropdownMenuItemBadge, DropdownMenuSearch, DropdownMenuEmpty, DropdownMenuLoading, DropdownMenuFooter, DropdownMenuGroup
dbui/components/ui/checkbox        → Checkbox
dbui/components/ui/radio-group     → RadioGroup, RadioGroupItem
dbui/components/ui/radio-tile      → RadioTile, RadioTileGroup
dbui/components/ui/switch          → Switch
dbui/components/ui/slider          → Slider
dbui/components/ui/label           → Label
dbui/components/ui/dialog          → Dialog, DialogTrigger, DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogTitle, DialogDescription, DialogFooter, DialogClose
dbui/components/ui/alert-dialog    → AlertDialog, AlertDialogTrigger, AlertDialogContent, AlertDialogHeader, AlertDialogTitle, AlertDialogDescription, AlertDialogFooter, AlertDialogAction, AlertDialogCancel
dbui/components/ui/alert           → Alert, AlertIcon, AlertContent, AlertTitle, AlertDescription, AlertAction, AlertClose
dbui/components/ui/sonner          → Toaster (provider) — use `import { toast } from "sonner"` for imperative
dbui/components/ui/popover         → Popover, PopoverTrigger, PopoverContent
dbui/components/ui/tooltip         → Tooltip, TooltipTrigger, TooltipContent
dbui/components/ui/hover-card      → HoverCard, HoverCardTrigger, HoverCardContent
dbui/components/ui/drawer          → Drawer, DrawerTrigger, DrawerContent, DrawerHeader, DrawerTitle, DrawerDescription
dbui/components/ui/tabs            → Tabs, TabsList, TabsTrigger, TabsContent
dbui/components/ui/table           → Table, TableHeader, TableBody, TableRow, TableHead, TableCell, TableCellIcon, TableCellTitle, TableCellMeta, TableCellStatus
dbui/components/ui/card            → Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardContent, CardFooter
dbui/components/ui/avatar          → Avatar, AvatarImage, AvatarFallback
dbui/components/ui/badge           → Badge
dbui/components/ui/tag             → Tag, TagIcon, TagLabel, TagValue, TagRemove
dbui/components/ui/breadcrumb      → Breadcrumb, BreadcrumbList, BreadcrumbItem, BreadcrumbLink, BreadcrumbSeparator, BreadcrumbPage
dbui/components/ui/pagination      → Pagination, PaginationContent, PaginationItem, PaginationLink, PaginationPrevious, PaginationNext
dbui/components/ui/accordion       → Accordion, AccordionItem, AccordionTrigger, AccordionContent
dbui/components/ui/navbar          → Navbar, NavbarSection, NavbarSectionHeader, NavbarItem, NavbarItemIcon
dbui/components/ui/data-tree       → Tree, TreeSection, TreeItem, TreeItemTag, DataTreeView, FileTreeView, TreeNodeRenderer
dbui/components/ui/separator       → Separator
dbui/components/ui/skeleton        → Skeleton
dbui/components/ui/spinner         → Spinner
dbui/components/ui/progress        → Progress
dbui/components/ui/empty           → Empty
dbui/components/ui/status          → Status
dbui/components/ui/key-value-pair  → KeyValuePair, KeyValueRow, KeyValueKey, KeyValueValue
dbui/components/ui/input-group     → InputGroup, InputGroupInput, InputGroupButton, InputGroupAddon
dbui/components/ui/editor-tabs     → EditorTabs, EditorTab
dbui/components/icons/{Name}       → 451 icons, 16×16 default. See icon search section below.
dbui/components/icons/entity-icons → dataEntityIcons, fileEntityIcons, columnTypeIcons (icon mappings)
dbui/tokens/globals.css            → All design tokens (import in root CSS)
```

### Key props for stateful components

| Component | Key props |
|-----------|-----------|
| Tabs | `defaultValue`, `value`, `onValueChange` |
| Select | `defaultValue`, `value`, `onValueChange` |
| Combobox | `value`, `onValueChange`, `multiple` |
| Dialog | `open`, `onOpenChange`, `defaultOpen` |
| AlertDialog | `open`, `onOpenChange` |
| DropdownMenu | `open`, `onOpenChange` |
| Popover | `open`, `onOpenChange` |
| Accordion | `type="single"` or `type="multiple"`, `defaultValue`, `collapsible` |
| Toggle | `pressed`, `onPressedChange`, `defaultPressed` |
| Switch | `checked`, `onCheckedChange` |
| Checkbox | `checked`, `onCheckedChange`, `indeterminate` |
| Tree | `defaultSelectedId`, `onSelect`, `onFocusNode`, `onNodeMenu` |
| DataTreeView | `sections` (TreeSectionData[]), `onSelect`, `onFocusNode` |
| Badge | `variant`: `"fill"` (default) or `"outline"` |
| Status | `status`: `"success"`, `"warning"`, `"error"`, `"info"`, `"neutral"` |
| Progress | `value` (0-100) |

## TREE COMPONENT

The Tree is the primary navigation component for hierarchical data in Databricks (catalogs, files, schemas). It is NOT the same as Navbar — use Navbar for flat product-area navigation, Tree for browsable hierarchies.

### Data Tree (catalog browsing)

Use `DataTreeView` for the data-driven API. Pass `sections` with `TreeSectionData[]`:

```tsx
import { DataTreeView, type TreeSectionData } from "dbui/components/ui/data-tree"
import { dataEntityIcons, columnTypeIcons } from "dbui/components/icons/entity-icons"

const sections: TreeSectionData[] = [
  {
    label: "My organization",
    defaultExpanded: true,
    nodes: [
      {
        id: "cat-main", label: "main",
        icon: dataEntityIcons.catalogWorkspace,
        children: [
          {
            id: "schema-default", label: "default",
            icon: dataEntityIcons.schema,
            children: [
              { id: "tbl-users", label: "users", icon: dataEntityIcons.table, leaf: false,
                children: [
                  { id: "col-id", label: "id", icon: columnTypeIcons.id, leaf: true, selectable: false },
                  { id: "col-name", label: "name", icon: columnTypeIcons.string, leaf: true, selectable: false },
                ]
              },
              { id: "view-active", label: "active_users", icon: dataEntityIcons.view },
            ]
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
  },
  { label: "Shared", nodes: [...] },
  { label: "Legacy", nodes: [...] }
]

<DataTreeView
  sections={sections}
  onSelect={(id) => navigate(id)}
  onFocusNode={(id, label, icon) => setRoot({ id, label, icon })}
  onNodeMenu={(id, label) => openContextMenu(id)}
/>
```

### TreeNode shape

```ts
type TreeNode = {
  id: string
  label: string
  icon?: ReactNode
  iconExpanded?: ReactNode
  selectable?: boolean
  leaf?: boolean
  children?: TreeNode[]
  trailing?: ReactNode
  defaultExpanded?: boolean
}
```

### File Tree (workspace files)

```tsx
import { FileTreeView } from "dbui/components/ui/data-tree"
import { fileEntityIcons } from "dbui/components/icons/entity-icons"

const nodes = [
  { id: "f1", label: "src", icon: fileEntityIcons.folder, iconExpanded: fileEntityIcons.folderOpen,
    children: [
      { id: "f2", label: "main.py", icon: fileEntityIcons.notebook, leaf: true },
      { id: "f3", label: "utils.py", icon: fileEntityIcons.file, leaf: true },
    ]
  }
]

<FileTreeView nodes={nodes} onSelect={(id) => openFile(id)} />
```

### Entity icon reference (from entity-icons.ts)

| Entity | Icon key | Icon component |
|--------|----------|----------------|
| Catalog (personal) | `catalogPersonal` | CatalogUserHome |
| Catalog (workspace) | `catalogWorkspace` | CatalogHome |
| Catalog (standard) | `catalog` | Catalog |
| Catalog (shared) | `catalogShared` | CatalogShared |
| Catalog (system) | `catalogSystem` | CatalogGear |
| Schema | `schema` | Database |
| Table | `table` | Table |
| View | `view` | TableView |
| Streaming table | `streamingTable` | TableStream |
| Model | `model` | Models |
| Volume | `volume` | FolderCloud |
| Function | `function` | Function |
| Column (ID/key) | `id` | Hash |
| Column (integer) | `integer` | Numbers |
| Column (string) | `string` | Letters |
| Column (boolean) | `boolean` | Binary |
| Column (timestamp) | `timestamp` | CalendarClock |

## COMPOSITION RECIPES

### Recipe: Full product page (Platform Shell)

```tsx
<div className="flex h-screen flex-col overflow-hidden bg-muted">
  {/* Platform Header — 48px, fixed */}
  <header className="flex h-12 shrink-0 items-center px-3 bg-muted">...</header>

  {/* Page area — sidebar + content */}
  <div className="flex flex-1 min-h-0 px-2 pb-2 gap-2">
    {/* Sidebar — 180px, fixed, scrolls independently */}
    <nav className="w-[180px] shrink-0 overflow-y-auto">
      <Navbar>
        <NavbarItem active><NavbarItemIcon><Data /></NavbarItemIcon>Catalog</NavbarItem>
        ...
      </Navbar>
    </nav>

    {/* Content surface — the ONLY scrollable area */}
    <main className="flex-1 min-w-0 min-h-0 overflow-y-auto bg-background border border-border rounded-lg">
      {/* Breadcrumb → Title row → Tabs → Content */}
    </main>
  </div>
</div>
```

### Recipe: Detail page with sidebar (Catalog Explorer, Table details, etc.)

```tsx
<div className="flex flex-1 min-h-0">
  {/* Left: Tree navigation — 260px */}
  <aside className="w-[260px] shrink-0 overflow-y-auto border-r border-border">
    <div className="flex items-center justify-between px-2 py-2">
      <button className="flex items-center gap-1.5 rounded-sm px-2 py-1 text-[13px] font-semibold hover:bg-hover">
        <Data className="size-4 text-muted-foreground" />
        Catalog
      </button>
      <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
        <Button size="icon-md" variant="ghost" aria-label="Create"><Plus /></Button>
        <Button size="icon-md" variant="ghost" aria-label="Refresh"><Refresh /></Button>
        <Button size="icon-md" variant="ghost" aria-label="More"><Overflow /></Button>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div className="px-2 pb-2">
      <InputGroup>
        <InputGroupAddon><Search /></InputGroupAddon>
        <InputGroupInput placeholder="Search..." />
        <InputGroupButton><Sliders /></InputGroupButton>
      </InputGroup>
    </div>
    <DataTreeView sections={sections} onSelect={handleSelect} onFocusNode={handleFocus} />
  </aside>

  {/* Center: Main content */}
  <main className="flex-1 min-w-0 overflow-y-auto">
    <div className="px-6 pt-4">
      <Breadcrumb>
        <BreadcrumbList>
          <BreadcrumbItem><BreadcrumbLink>Catalog</BreadcrumbLink></BreadcrumbItem>
          <BreadcrumbSeparator />
          <BreadcrumbItem><BreadcrumbLink>main</BreadcrumbLink></BreadcrumbItem>
          <BreadcrumbSeparator />
          <BreadcrumbItem><BreadcrumbPage>users</BreadcrumbPage></BreadcrumbItem>
        </BreadcrumbList>
      </Breadcrumb>
    </div>

    <div className="flex items-center justify-between px-6 py-3">
      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
        <TableIcon className="size-5 text-muted-foreground" />
        <h1 className="text-[22px] font-semibold">table_name</h1>
        <Badge variant="outline"><CertifiedFill className="size-3 text-success" />Certified</Badge>
      </div>
      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
        <Button variant="outline">Open in a dashboard</Button>
        <Button variant="outline"><ButtonIcon><Share /></ButtonIcon>Share<ButtonChevron /></Button>
        <Button>Create<ButtonChevron /></Button>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div className="px-6">
      <Tabs defaultValue="overview">
        <TabsList>
          <TabsTrigger value="overview">Overview</TabsTrigger>
          <TabsTrigger value="explore">Explore Data</TabsTrigger>
          <TabsTrigger value="details">Details</TabsTrigger>
          <TabsTrigger value="permissions">Permissions</TabsTrigger>
          <TabsTrigger value="history">History</TabsTrigger>
          <TabsTrigger value="lineage">Lineage</TabsTrigger>
        </TabsList>
        <TabsContent value="overview">{/* Tab content */}</TabsContent>
      </Tabs>
    </div>
  </main>

  {/* Right: Metadata sidebar — 280px */}
  <aside className="w-[280px] shrink-0 overflow-y-auto border-l border-border px-4 py-4">
    <h3 className="text-[13px] font-semibold mb-3">About this table</h3>
    <KeyValuePair>
      <KeyValueRow><KeyValueKey>Owner</KeyValueKey><KeyValueValue>Jocelyn Hickcox</KeyValueValue></KeyValueRow>
      <KeyValueRow><KeyValueKey>Data source</KeyValueKey><KeyValueValue><Badge>Delta</Badge></KeyValueValue></KeyValueRow>
      <KeyValueRow><KeyValueKey>Last updated</KeyValueKey><KeyValueValue>11 hours ago</KeyValueValue></KeyValueRow>
    </KeyValuePair>
    <Separator className="my-4" />
    <h3 className="text-[13px] font-semibold mb-3">Quality</h3>
    <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
      <Status status="success" />
      <span className="text-[13px]">Healthy</span>
    </div>
    <Separator className="my-4" />
    <h3 className="text-[13px] font-semibold mb-3">Tags</h3>
    <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-1">
      <Badge variant="outline">system.certified</Badge>
      <Badge variant="outline">Domain: Agriculture</Badge>
    </div>
  </aside>
</div>
```

### Recipe: Columns table with types and tags

```tsx
<div className="px-6 py-4">
  <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-3">
    <h2 className="text-[18px] font-semibold">Columns</h2>
    <Input placeholder="Filter columns" className="w-[200px]" />
  </div>
  <Table>
    <TableHeader>
      <TableRow>
        <TableHead>Column</TableHead>
        <TableHead>Type</TableHead>
        <TableHead>Comment</TableHead>
        <TableHead>Tags</TableHead>
      </TableRow>
    </TableHeader>
    <TableBody>
      <TableRow>
        <TableCell>
          <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
            <span className="text-[13px]">user_id</span>
            <Badge variant="outline" className="text-[11px]">PK</Badge>
          </div>
        </TableCell>
        <TableCell className="text-muted-foreground">bigint</TableCell>
        <TableCell className="text-muted-foreground">Primary key</TableCell>
        <TableCell><Badge variant="outline">PII</Badge></TableCell>
      </TableRow>
    </TableBody>
  </Table>
</div>
```

### Recipe: List page (inside content surface)

```tsx
{/* Breadcrumb */}
<div className="px-6 pt-4"><Breadcrumb>...</Breadcrumb></div>

{/* Page title + actions */}
<div className="flex items-center justify-between px-6 py-3">
  <h1 className="text-[22px] font-semibold">Page Title</h1>
  <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
    <Button variant="outline">Share</Button>
    <Button>Create</Button>
  </div>
</div>

{/* Tabs */}
<div className="px-6">
  <Tabs defaultValue="all">
    <TabsList>
      <TabsTrigger value="all">All</TabsTrigger>
      <TabsTrigger value="mine">Mine</TabsTrigger>
    </TabsList>
  </Tabs>
</div>

{/* Control bar */}
<div className="flex items-center gap-2 px-6 py-3">
  <Input placeholder="Filter..." className="w-[240px]" />
  <Toggle variant="filter">Status</Toggle>
  <Toggle variant="filter">Type</Toggle>
</div>

{/* Table */}
<div className="px-6">
  <Table>
    <TableHeader>
      <TableRow><TableHead>Name</TableHead><TableHead>Status</TableHead></TableRow>
    </TableHeader>
    <TableBody>
      <TableRow><TableCell>Item</TableCell><TableCell><Status status="success" label="Running" /></TableCell></TableRow>
    </TableBody>
  </Table>
</div>
```

### Recipe: Form in a dialog

```tsx
<Dialog>
  <DialogTrigger render={<Button />}>Create Connection</DialogTrigger>
  <DialogContent>
    <DialogHeader>
      <DialogTitle>New Connection</DialogTitle>
      <DialogDescription>Connect to an external data source.</DialogDescription>
    </DialogHeader>

    <div className="flex flex-col gap-4 py-4">
      <div className="flex flex-col gap-1.5">
        <Label htmlFor="name">Connection name</Label>
        <Input id="name" placeholder="my-connection" />
      </div>
      <div className="flex flex-col gap-1.5">
        <Label htmlFor="type">Connection type</Label>
        <Select>
          <SelectTrigger><SelectValue placeholder="Select type..." /></SelectTrigger>
          <SelectContent>
            <SelectItem value="postgres">PostgreSQL</SelectItem>
            <SelectItem value="mysql">MySQL</SelectItem>
          </SelectContent>
        </Select>
      </div>
    </div>

    <DialogFooter>
      <Button variant="outline">Cancel</Button>
      <Button>Create</Button>
    </DialogFooter>
  </DialogContent>
</Dialog>
```

### Recipe: Dropdown menu

```tsx
<DropdownMenu>
  <DropdownMenuTrigger render={<Button variant="outline" />}>
    Actions<ButtonChevron />
  </DropdownMenuTrigger>
  <DropdownMenuContent align="start">
    <DropdownMenuItem>
      <DropdownMenuItemIcon><Pencil /></DropdownMenuItemIcon>
      Edit
      <DropdownMenuShortcut>⌘E</DropdownMenuShortcut>
    </DropdownMenuItem>
    <DropdownMenuItem>
      <DropdownMenuItemIcon><Copy /></DropdownMenuItemIcon>
      Duplicate
    </DropdownMenuItem>
    <DropdownMenuSeparator />
    <DropdownMenuItem variant="destructive">
      <DropdownMenuItemIcon><Trash /></DropdownMenuItemIcon>
      Delete
    </DropdownMenuItem>
  </DropdownMenuContent>
</DropdownMenu>
```

### Recipe: Menu item that opens a dialog

```tsx
<Dialog>
  <DropdownMenu>
    <DropdownMenuTrigger render={<Button variant="outline" />}>Options</DropdownMenuTrigger>
    <DropdownMenuContent>
      <DropdownMenuItem>Existing action</DropdownMenuItem>
      <DialogTrigger render={<DropdownMenuItem />}>
        <DropdownMenuItemIcon><Plus /></DropdownMenuItemIcon>
        New Connection...
      </DialogTrigger>
    </DropdownMenuContent>
  </DropdownMenu>
  <DialogContent>{/* Dialog content here */}</DialogContent>
</Dialog>
```

### Recipe: Loading and empty states

```tsx
{/* Table loading — skeleton rows */}
<Table>
  <TableHeader>
    <TableRow><TableHead>Name</TableHead><TableHead>Status</TableHead></TableRow>
  </TableHeader>
  <TableBody>
    {[1, 2, 3].map(i => (
      <TableRow key={i}>
        <TableCell><Skeleton className="h-4 w-[180px]" /></TableCell>
        <TableCell><Skeleton className="h-4 w-[80px]" /></TableCell>
      </TableRow>
    ))}
  </TableBody>
</Table>

{/* Empty state */}
<Empty title="No results found" description="Try adjusting your filters or search terms.">
  <Button variant="outline">Clear filters</Button>
</Empty>

{/* Page-level loading */}
<div className="flex items-center justify-center py-12">
  <Spinner />
</div>
```

## NESTED COMPONENT MAPPING

### Button anatomy
```
<Button>
  <ButtonIcon>{icon}</ButtonIcon>     ← optional leading icon
  Label text                          ← required
  <ButtonChevron />                   ← optional trailing chevron (menu trigger)
</Button>
```
Variants: default (primary), outline, secondary, ghost, link, destructive, danger
Sizes: sm (24px), md (32px), icon-sm (24px square), icon-md (32px square)

### Menu item anatomy
```
<DropdownMenuItem>
  <DropdownMenuItemIcon>{icon}</DropdownMenuItemIcon>  ← optional, but if one item has it, ALL must
  Label text                                            ← required
  <DropdownMenuItemDescription>Secondary</...>          ← optional subtitle
  <DropdownMenuShortcut>⌘K</...>                        ← optional trailing shortcut
  <DropdownMenuItemBadge>3</...>                        ← optional trailing count
</DropdownMenuItem>
```

### Alert anatomy
```
<Alert variant="warning">
  <AlertIcon><WarningFill /></AlertIcon>
  <AlertContent>
    <AlertTitle>Title</AlertTitle>
    <AlertDescription>Details</AlertDescription>
  </AlertContent>
  <AlertClose />
</Alert>
```

## ICON SEARCH

451 icons with semantic tags. Each icon has: `/** use:<category> <concept> | <synonyms> */`

**Categories:**
- `use:object` — Databricks product concepts (nav items, table cells, cards, tree nodes)
- `use:action` — Verbs (buttons, toolbar actions, menu items)
- `use:indicator` — Status/state (badges, alerts, status cells)
- `use:component` — Control chrome only (chevrons, checks, close — don't use outside their control)

**How to find icons:**
```bash
grep "use:object Experiment" packages/dbui/src/components/icons/
grep "flask\|lab" packages/dbui/src/components/icons/
grep "use:action delete" packages/dbui/src/components/icons/
```

**Common mappings:**
| Concept | Icon | Why |
|---------|------|-----|
| Experiments | Beaker | flask/lab metaphor |
| Jobs/Lakeflow | Workflows | DAG metaphor |
| Compute | Cloud | cloud resource |
| Unity Catalog | Data | data/catalog metaphor |
| Genie | SparkleRectangle | AI sparkle |
| SQL Warehouses | CloudDatabase | cloud DB |
| Marketplace | Storefront | shop metaphor |

## COMPOSITION RULES

### Buttons
- Link variant: NO icons (only exception: trailing NewWindow for external links)
- Ghost buttons: prefer icon-only. Ghost + icon + label competes with Outline.
- Menu triggers: outline or secondary, never primary. The chevron is the affordance.
- Max one Primary button per visible area.
- Icon-only buttons (`size="icon-md"`) use `text-muted-foreground` automatically.
- Icons inside buttons (via `<ButtonIcon>`) are `text-muted-foreground` automatically.

### Menus
- Popup left-aligns with trigger (`align="start"`)
- If one item has an icon, ALL items in that group must have icons
- Destructive items: always last, always preceded by separator
- Section headers use `<DropdownMenuLabel>` inside `<DropdownMenuGroup>`

### Dialogs
- Primary action rightmost in footer. Cancel left, confirm right.
- Non-alert dialogs must have a close button (top-right)
- Max one dialog open at a time — never stack
- For simple confirmations, use AlertDialog (can't be dismissed by overlay click)

### Forms
- Select for ≤10 options. Combobox for >10 or when search is needed.
- Label uses Bold style (13px Semibold). Helper text uses Hint (12px Regular muted).
- Error message replaces helper text, never stacks below it.

### Navigation
- **Navbar** = flat product-area navigation (Catalog, SQL Editor, Compute, etc.)
- **Tree** = hierarchical browsable data (catalogs → schemas → tables, folders → files)
- Every NavbarItem MUST have an icon (sidebar is icon-first)
- Active item: bg-accent + text-accent-foreground + font-semibold

### Trees
- Every tree node MUST have an icon — use entity-icons.ts mappings
- Leaf nodes (columns, files): `leaf: true` hides the chevron
- Non-selectable nodes (columns, section headers): `selectable: false`
- Use `DataTreeView` for sectioned data (My organization / Shared / Legacy)
- Use `FileTreeView` for flat file trees (no sections)

### Tables
- Sort indicator visible on sortable columns even when unsorted
- Row hover: bg-muted/50
- Header: font-semibold. Body: font-normal.

### Detail pages
- Three-column layout: tree nav (260px) | main content (flex-1) | metadata sidebar (280px)
- Each column scrolls independently
- Metadata sidebar sections separated by `<Separator className="my-4" />`

### Layout
- Page padding: px-6 py-4 inside content surface
- Section gaps: gap-4 between distinct sections. gap-2 within a component.
- Shell bg is bg-muted (grey). Content surface is bg-background (white) with border and rounded-lg.

## SPACING QUICK REFERENCE

| Gap | Value | Use |
|-----|-------|-----|
| gap-1 (4px) | Inside controls (icon↔label in small buttons) |
| gap-1.5 (6px) | Label to input |
| gap-2 (8px) | Within a component (icon↔text, related items) |
| gap-4 (16px) | Between sections, between form fields |
| gap-6 (24px) | Between major content blocks, sidebar sections |

## TYPOGRAPHY QUICK REFERENCE

| Use | Style |
|-----|-------|
| Body text, input values | 13px/20px Regular (text-[13px] leading-[20px]) |
| Labels, emphasis | 13px/20px Semibold (font-semibold) |
| Captions, helper text | 12px/16px Regular (text-[12px] leading-[16px]) |
| Section headings | 18px/24px Semibold SF Pro Display |
| Page titles | 22px/28px Semibold SF Pro Display |
| Code | 13px/20px SF Mono |

## KNOWN GAPS

These components are planned but not yet available:
- DatePicker — calendar + popover + range modes
- Stepper — multi-step wizard (compose from Tabs + custom state as interim)
- Banner — full-width system notification bar
- CodeBlock — syntax-highlighted code display
- Chart — uses Vega, not part of DBUI
- Virtualized lists — for 1000+ items in Select/Combobox (use react-window)

---

# Resources

- Storybook: https://dbuidesign.vercel.app
- GitHub: https://github.com/muditmittal/dbui
- Issues: https://github.com/muditmittal/dbui/issues
